en: Be imitators of me, as I am of Christ.
zh: 你們應該效法我，好像我效法基督一樣。

en: Now I commend you because you remember me in everything and maintain the traditions even as I delivered them to you.
zh: 我稱讚你們，因為你們在一切事上都記念我，又持守我傳交給你們的教訓。

en: But I want you to understand that the head of every man is Christ, the head of a wife is her husband, and the head of Christ is God.
zh: 但是我願意你們知道，基督是男人的頭，男人是女人的頭 ， 神是基督的頭。

en: Every man who prays or prophesies with his head covered dishonors his head,
zh: 男人禱告或講道的時候，如果蒙著頭，就是羞辱自己的頭。

en: but every wife who prays or prophesies with her head uncovered dishonors her head- it is the same as if her head were shaven.
zh: 女人禱告或講道的時候，如果不蒙著頭，就是羞辱自己的頭，因為這就好像剃了頭髮一樣。

en: For if a wife will not cover her head, then she should cut her hair short. But since it is disgraceful for a wife to cut off her hair or shave her head, let her cover her head.
zh: 女人要不蒙著頭，她就應當把頭髮剪了；如果女人以為剪髮或剃頭是羞恥的事，她就應當蒙著頭。

en: For a man ought not to cover his head, since he is the image and glory of God, but woman is the glory of man.
zh: 男人不應蒙著頭，因為他是 神的形象和榮耀，而女人是男人的榮耀。

en: For man was not made from woman, but woman from man.
zh: 因為男人不是由女人而出，女人卻是由男人而出，

en: Neither was man created for woman, but woman for man.
zh: 並且男人不是為了女人而造的，女人卻是為了男人而造的。

en: That is why a wife ought to have a symbol of authority on her head, because of the angels.
zh: 因此，為天使的緣故，女人應當在頭上有服權柄的記號。

en: Nevertheless, in the Lord woman is not independent of man nor man of woman;
zh: 然而在主裡面，女人不可以沒有男人，男人也不可以沒有女人。

en: for as woman was made from man, so man is now born of woman. And all things are from God.
zh: 因為正如女人是由男人而出，照樣，男人是藉著女人而生；萬有都是出於 神。

en: Judge for yourselves: is it proper for a wife to pray to God with her head uncovered?
zh: 你們自己判斷一下，女人向 神禱告的時候不蒙頭，是合適的嗎？

en: Does not nature itself teach you that if a man wears long hair it is a disgrace for him,
zh: 人的本性不是也教導你們，如果男人有長頭髮，就是他的羞恥嗎？

en: but if a woman has long hair, it is her glory? For her hair is given to her for a covering.
zh: 如果女人有長頭髮，不就是她的榮耀嗎？因為頭髮是給她作蓋頭的。

en: If anyone is inclined to be contentious, we have no such practice, nor do the churches of God.
zh: 如果有人想要強辯，我們卻沒有這種習慣， 神的眾教會也沒有。

en: But in the following instructions I do not commend you, because when you come together it is not for the better but for the worse.
zh: 我現在要吩咐你們，不是要稱讚你們，因為你們聚集在一起，並沒有得到益處，反而有害處。

en: For, in the first place, when you come together as a church, I hear that there are divisions among you. And I believe it in part,
zh: 首先，我聽說你們在聚會的時候，你們中間起了分裂，這話我也稍微相信。

en: for there must be factions among you in order that those who are genuine among you may be recognized.
zh: 你們中間會有分黨結派的事，這是必然的，為的是要使那些經得起考驗的人顯明出來。

en: When you come together, it is not the Lord's supper that you eat.
zh: 你們聚集在一起，不是吃主的晚餐，

en: For in eating, each one goes ahead with his own meal. One goes hungry, another gets drunk.
zh: 因為吃的時候，各人都先吃自己的晚餐，結果有人飢餓，有人醉了。

en: What! Do you not have houses to eat and drink in? Or do you despise the church of God and humiliate those who have nothing? What shall I say to you? Shall I commend you in this? No, I will not.
zh: 難道你們沒有家可以吃喝嗎？還是你們藐視 神的教會，使那些沒有的羞愧呢？我向你們可以說甚麼呢？稱讚你們嗎？在這事上我不能稱讚。

en: For I received from the Lord what I also delivered to you, that the Lord Jesus on the night when he was betrayed took bread,
zh: 我當日傳交給你們的，原是從主領受的，就是主耶穌被出賣的那一夜，他拿起餅來，

en: and when he had given thanks, he broke it, and said, "This is my body which is for you. Do this in remembrance of me."
zh: 祝謝了，就擘開，說：“這是我的身體，為你們擘開的；你們應當這樣行，為的是記念我。”

en: In the same way also he took the cup, after supper, saying, "This cup is the new covenant in my blood. Do this, as often as you drink it, in remembrance of me."
zh: 飯後，照樣拿起杯來，說：“這杯是用我的血所立的新約，你們每逢喝的時候，應當這樣行，為的是記念我。”

en: For as often as you eat this bread and drink the cup, you proclaim the Lord's death until he comes.
zh: 你們每逢吃這餅，喝這杯，就是宣揚主的死，直等到他來。

en: Whoever, therefore, eats the bread or drinks the cup of the Lord in an unworthy manner will be guilty of profaning the body and blood of the Lord.
zh: 因此，無論甚麼人若用不合適的態度吃主的餅，喝主的杯，就是得罪主的身體、主的血了。

en: Let a person examine himself, then, and so eat of the bread and drink of the cup.
zh: 所以人應當省察自己，然後才吃這餅，喝這杯。

en: For anyone who eats and drinks without discerning the body eats and drinks judgment on himself.
zh: 因為那吃喝的人，如果不辨明是主的身體，就是吃喝定在自己的身上的罪了。

en: That is why many of you are weak and ill, and some have died.
zh: 因此，你們中間有許多人是軟弱的，患病的，而且死了 的也不少。

en: But if we judged ourselves truly, we would not be judged.
zh: 我們若仔細省察自己，就不會受審判了。

en: But when we are judged by the Lord, we are disciplined so that we may not be condemned along with the world.
zh: 然而我們被主審判的時候，是受他的管教，免得和世人一同被定罪。

en: So then, my brothers, when you come together to eat, wait for one another-
zh: 所以，我的弟兄們，你們聚集在一起吃的時候，要彼此等待。

en: if anyone is hungry, let him eat at home- so that when you come together it will not be for judgment. About the other things I will give directions when I come.
zh: 如果有人餓了，就應當在家裡先吃，免得你們聚集在一起的時候受到審判。其餘的事，我來的時候再作安排。
